description: A credential artifact that is either (a) a W3C Verifiable Credential (opaque JSON object) or (b) a document attachment reference requiring manual/offline verification.
title: Credential

oneOf.title: W3C Verifiable Credential
oneOf.description: A W3C Verifiable Credential as per the W3C VC Data Model. Treated as an opaque object at the schema layer.

oneOf.title: Document Credential
oneOf.description: A document attachment used as a credential.
